summary: Frontend testing of SDM Super App admin features completed successfully. All requested features verified working: Admin login, Transactions tab, SDM Commissions panel (for super_admin), commission rate modification (0.5%-20%), and commission withdrawal form.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin dashboard features working correctly. Commission rate modification validated with min/max constraints (0.5-20%). Withdrawal form for SDM commissions visible to super_admin only.

frontend_ui: Transactions tab displays 'Historique des Transactions' with filters (Tous, Completed, Pending, Failed) - PASS
Transactions tab shows stats cards: Volume total, Transactions, Commission SDM, Cashback distribué - PASS
Transactions table displays: Transaction ID, Marchand, Client, Montant, Marchand reçoit, Commission, Cashback, Status, Date - PASS
SDM Commissions tab visible ONLY for super_admin - PASS
SDM Commissions panel shows 3 stat cards: Total earned, Total withdrawn, Available balance - PASS
Commission Rate section shows current rate (2%) with 'Modifier' button - PASS
Commission Rate form opens with: Input (min=0.5, max=20), description 'entre 0.5% et 20%', Enregistrer, Annuler buttons - PASS
Withdrawal form shows: Amount input, Network select (MTN/Telecel/AirtelTigo), MoMo number, Account name, Confirmer le retrait button - PASS
Recent commissions section shows transaction history - PASS
backend_apis: PUT /api/sdm/admin/commission-rate (invalid: 0.1%) - PASS (rejected with 'Commission rate must be between 0.5% and 20%')
GET /api/sdm/admin/commissions - PASS (returns total_earned, total_withdrawn, available_balance, recent_commissions, withdrawal_history)
GET /api/sdm/admin/transactions - PASS (returns transactions array with full details)
GET /api/sdm/admin/transactions/stats - PASS (returns today_volume, today_count, total_commission, total_cashback)

verified_requirements.admin_transactions_tab: PASS - Tab displays transaction history with all columns and filter options
verified_requirements.sdm_commissions_visible_to_super_admin: PASS - 'Commissions SDM' tab only visible when currentAdmin.role === 'super_admin'
verified_requirements.commission_rate_configurable_0.5_to_20: PASS - Input has min=0.5, max=20 constraints; API validates and rejects invalid rates
verified_requirements.commission_withdrawal_form: PASS - Form shows all required fields: amount, network, momo_number, account_name with confirmation button

mocked_apis_list: BulkClix payment API integration is SIMULATED for testing - real payments go through BulkClix

commission_rate_put_error.detail: Commission rate must be between 0.5% and 20%
